text.title: Ideation Methods: SCAMPER, Mind Mapping, Starbursting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-method
step.action: SCAMPER for variant generation on existing thing; Mind Map for connection exploration; Starbursting for scoping ambiguous initiative.

step.name: fill-worksheet
step.action: Run the template prompt; ensure full coverage of method's required structure.
step.decision-gate: If SCAMPER lens empty, retry with more specific prompt.

step.name: depth-check
step.action: Mind Map depth ≥3; SCAMPER all 7 lenses; Starbursting all 6 Ws.

step.name: tag-promising
step.action: Flag 3-5 most promising ideas for downstream consumer.

step.name: validate-and-handoff
step.action: Run `validate-ideation-methods.py`. Hand off to PM / consumer.
